title: CPU Architecture & Embedded Systems
desc: Fetch-execute cycle, CPU components, performance factors, and embedded systems — six exercises for J277 1.1.1–1.1.3

title: Client-Server & Peer-to-Peer Networks
desc: Multi-tab interactive activity covering client-server, peer-to-peer, star and mesh topologies with escalating difficulty

title: The Internet, DNS & the Cloud
desc: Eight tasks covering the Internet as a network of networks, DNS lookup, web servers, client-server model, cloud computing, and cloud storage advantages/disadvantages — including a peer-marking challenge.

title: Network Topology Builder
desc: Drag and drop network devices to build bus, star, and ring topologies, then evaluate their advantages and disadvantages.

title: Router vs Switch
desc: Drag-and-drop Venn diagram sorting router-only, switch-only, and shared features of network devices

title: Cybersecurity – Threats & Prevention
desc: Seven-exercise activity covering threats (malware, phishing, brute force, DoS, SQL injection), prevention methods (including physical: locks, CCTV, security guards) and exam practice

title: Operating Systems – Mind Map Builder
desc: Drag-and-drop mind map that graduates to typed recall as answers are mastered

title: Legislation Activities
desc: 3 drag-and-drop gap-fill exercises covering key legislation terms, DPA responsibilities, and scenario application

title: Impacts of Digital Technology on Society
desc: Six activities covering ethical, legal, cultural, environmental and privacy issues, plus open source vs proprietary software licences

title: Spot the Error
desc: Part A: identify error types from broken code. Part B: introduce a named error into a working line.

title: Bug-Fix Challenges
desc: 7 escalating bug-fix tasks — SyntaxError, NameError, IndentationError

title: Casting Exercises
desc: Practice converting between int, float and str using Python casting functions.

title: Input & Casting PRIMM Practice
desc: Predict, Run, Investigate, Modify and Make tasks for Python input and type casting

title: PRIMM Practice – For Loops & Turtle
desc: Guided PRIMM workbook for for loops and turtle graphics

title: Functions PRIMM Practice
desc: Predict, Run, Investigate, Modify and Make tasks for Python functions

title: Year 8 Python Assessment
desc: 45-minute end-of-unit assessment covering errors, casting, loops and functions.

title: Targeted Practice — Year 8 Python
desc: Personalised follow-up to the assessment — practises the topics each student found tricky.

title: Primary & Secondary Memory
desc: Fill-in-the-blanks and diagram-building exercises on primary memory and secondary storage

title: RAM vs ROM Sorting
desc: 3 tasks covering RAM vs ROM card sort, types of primary memory, and spot the mistake on secondary storage

title: Secondary Storage – Types & Sorting
desc: What is secondary storage, how each type works (with gap fill), and sorting devices

title: Secondary Storage – Characteristics & Application
desc: Characteristics MCQ, Spot the Error, Scenarios, Fix the Bad Advice, Compare Devices

title: Network Hardware
desc: LAN/WAN sorting, hardware matching, true/false with error correction, and extension tasks
